shorts.title: UNICO Foundation donates to St. Francis of Assisi Kitchen
shorts.description: The UNICO Foundation recently presented a check in support of St. Francis of Assisi Kitchen in Scranton. The funds were granted from the Torraco Food Bank/Shelter Fund set up by member Ralph Torraco in an effort to assist those in need of food and shelter. With the motto of “Service Above Self,” the endowment was established so families and children will be given a safe haven and never go hungry. Taking part in the presentation, from left: Mike Rescigno, chair of the Torraco Fund; Chris DiMattio, chair of the UNICO Foundation; and Rob Williams, executive director of St. Francis of […]
shorts.content: The UNICO Foundation recently presented a check in support of St. Francis of Assisi Kitchen in Scranton. The funds were granted from the Torraco Food Bank/Shelter Fund set up by member Ralph Torraco in an effort to assist those in need of food and shelter. shorts.title: Pop-up adoption shop helps find homes for kittens
shorts.title_distilled: Pop-up adoption shop helps find homes for kittens.
shorts.description: PECKVILLE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A pop-up adoption shop was held in Lackawanna County to potentially find new homes for two kittens. Cheddar Bay Biscuit and Scampitwo are siblings and are looking for their forever homes. This pop-up adoption was held by Barbuti Kitten Academy and Charm School at Old and Brew Coffee in Peckville. [...]

shorts.title: Dunmore bridge closed, detour in place
shorts.title_distilled: Dunmore bridge closed, detour in place.
shorts.description: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Drivers will need to find another route on Sunday as a bridge is out of service in Lackawanna County. A Dunmore bridge connecting the 1000 block of Mill Street to Erie Street, also referred to as Bunker Hill, is closed to all traffic on Sunday. Those who were planning to [...]
